class.name: mmp_rviz_plugins/MapSelector
class.description: Panel for selecting and loading different terrain maps in MMP project

class.name: mmp_rviz_plugins/TrajectoryCommand
class.description: Panel for setting start/goal points and publishing trajectory commands

class.name: mmp_rviz_plugins/PointPicker
class.description: Tool for picking points on the ground plane (z=0) anywhere in the viewport
